# Page 1^page=1
Name: Lisa A English | DOB: 7/25/1964 | MRN: 055656 | PCP: Jung Wook Kang Smith, MD | Legal Name: Lisa A English Progress Notes Updated Jun 20, 2026 PHYSICAL THERAPY Patient: Lisa A English Age: 61 y.o. DOB: 7/25/1964 Narrative Pt refusing to get OOB again this date, but agreeable to in bed assessment and request help to reposition in bed. Pt does well with rolling and able to assist with UEs and bridging to move higher in the bed. O2 desat to 87% after activity and pt improved to 95% with 3-4 minutes of rest and quiet breathing. Pt agreeable to chair position but is refusing chair due to being stuck in the recliner at home for 2 days. PT will continue to progress with mobility assessment to be completed next tx with OT. Recommendations Therapy Recommendations: Pt would benefit from continued therapy at a facility level Barriers to Discharge: Decreased cognition/safety awareness, Does not have assist needed for safe mobility/balance This discharge disposition is recommended by PT based on this assessment; however, ultimate discharge disposition will be decided collaboratively with patient, caregivers, and multidisciplinary team. Outcome Measure Basic Mobility Raw Score: 8 (06/20/26 1103) Basic Mobility T-Scale Score: 22.61 (06/20/26 1103) Plan Treatment/Interventions: LE strengthening/ROM, Patient/Family education PT Frequency: Daily, 6x/week Progress Notes by Charlene N at 06/20/26 1103

# Page 2^page=2
MyChart® licensed from Epic Systems Corporation© 1999 - 2026 Prior Level of Function Permanent Residence: Home Home Layout: One level, Ramped entrance Home Equipment Available : Rolling Walker, Cane, Manual wheelchair, CPAP/BiPAP, Oxygen, Drop arm bedside commode (bariatric BSC, slide pad, slide board) Prior Device Use: Motorized wheelchair or scooter, Mechanical lift Self Care (New): Needed some help Indoor Mobility (Ambulation) (New): Needed some help Stairs (New): Not applicable Functional Cognition (New): Independent Who do you live with?: Adult Child (son) Transfers Rolling left and right: Supervision or touching assistance, Using bedrail Lying to sitting on side of bed: Patient refused Sitting to lying: Patient refused Sit to Stand: Patient refused Chair/bed to chair transfer: Patient refused Mobility Ambulation Assist: Patient refused Stairs Balance Sitting - Static: Unable to assess Sitting - Dynamic: Unable to assess Standing - Static: Unable to assess Standing - Dynamic: Unable to assess Charlene A Nolen, PT, CWS
